event_info: soft LBW check but too optimistic from Arshdeep. Ball swung too much and was going down the leg-side. The ump wasn't interested. Rahane looked to flick this length delivery behind square and got hit on the pad
that's a very good first ball to Finn Allen. Swung away and opened up the batter. Because it was only around 129kph; Allen could adjust and fend to cover with soft hands

that's guided and Jinks manages to guide it between slip and short third who is pretty fine as well. Let this full delivery come to bat; opened the face slightly to send it off the outer half of the bat and it raced away to the fence for the first boundary of the game
swinging away outside off stump; Rahane dabs past point

hands on head for Arshdeep Singh as he targetting the inswinging leg stump yorker. Allen manages to dig it out off the inside edge and it goes between the legs to the fine leg fence. Went as a low full toss and Allen got lucky there
full toss again; Allen mistimes the drive. Mid-off cuts it off to the left

very close to a nick. That swings away from the right-hander and beats the outside edge through to the keeper. Allen was looking to swing through the line over the in-field. Missed the edge by a whisker

comedy of errors! Firstly the batter moved a long way across to scoop; missed and the ball hit the body to float towards the keeper. Finn Allen thought he could sneak a bye without knowing where the ball was. Prabhsimran Singh ran forward and had a shy at the stumps but the bowler got in the way of the throw and it hit him
beaten! Swinging away outside off stump; Allen is struggling against the swinging ball it was bizarre to not see a slip first ball

ball_event: out Caught by Prabhsimran Singh!! Finds the edge this time and the struggle ends. All Xavier Bartlett was doing this entire over was bowl short of a length and take it away from Allen. The NZ batter only wanted to belt every ball down the ground. This time he tries to loft a fullish ball through the line
event_info: gets an outside edge and it goes straight to Prabhsimran Singh. Finn Allen c Prabhsimran Singh b Xavier Bartlett 6(7) [4s-1]
outside edge and it escapes between slip and short third man. Outswinger outside off stump; Green pushes at it and gets away with the thick edge. Off the mark in streaky fashion

ball_event: out Caught by Prabhsimran Singh!! It's another outie and it's another edge to Prabhsimran Singh. This guy is a gun bowler when it swings. Short of a length delivery moving away
event_info: Green pushes away from the body and nicked off. He was caught on the crease and caught fishing at the ball. It's not looking good for KKR already. Cameron Green c Prabhsimran Singh b Xavier Bartlett 4(2) [4s-1]
good length delivery outside off stump; Rahane dabs to deep backward point
good length delivery angling away; Raghuvanshi plays inside the line and lets it go last moment
short of length delivery on the stumps; Raghuvanshi knocks it to square leg
short of length delivery outside off stump; Rahane taps it towards point
front foot across to over the sticks; sees the ball move across him and lets it pass
wristed through backward square leg
advances to kill the swing and defends it back to the bowler; who threatens to have a shy at the stumps to send the batter back
brilliant full outie finishing around off stump; Raghuvanshi gives the full face of the bat in his defence

what was a good ball; turns out to be five runs for the batter and KKR. Full delivery moving away; Raghuvanshi was kind of squared up and he pushed this off the outer half to mid-off. Shreyas took aim at the bowler's end to try a runout but he missed the target. There was no one at short fine leg or fine leg to back up. So Jansen cut across from the off-side and he tried to stop it with a slide. Ended up deflecting it away from Shashank Singh who was behind him to stop the ball. Runs away to the fence for four extra runs
defended
